BATCH_NO.config: label='Batch No.' value=None regex='Batch\\s*No\\.?\\s*[:\\-]?\\s*\\|?\\s*(\\d[\\d\\s]*?)(?=\\s*(?:No\\.|containers|\\||$))' type='string' expected_label=None multi_page=False continuation_regex=None validation_rules=None

CONTAINERS_PACKS.config: label='No. of containers / packs' value=None regex='No\\.\\s*of\\s*containers?\\s*/?\\s*packs?\\s*[:\\-]?\\s*\\|?\\s*([^\\n|]+)' type='string' expected_label=None multi_page=False continuation_regex=None validation_rules=None
